---
title: "OSM for sustainable transport planning"
description: "Greta Timaite, James Hulse, and Robin Lovelace (2022). OSM for sustainable transport planning. *Proceedings of the Academic Track at State of the Map 2022*. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7004509"
date: "2022-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "timaite_osm_2022"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Proceedings of the Academic Track at State of the Map 2022"
doi: "10.5281/zenodo.7004509"
publication-url: "https://zenodo.org/record/7004509"
authors:
  - "Greta Timaite"
  - "James Hulse"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Proceedings of the Academic Track at State of the Map 2022
**Year:** 2022

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7004509) [Publisher Link](https://zenodo.org/record/7004509) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Greta Timaite, James Hulse, and Robin Lovelace (2022). OSM for sustainable transport planning. *Proceedings of the Academic Track at State of the Map 2022*. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7004509

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{timaite_osm_2022,
  title = {OSM for Sustainable Transport Planning},
  author = {Timaite, Greta and Hulse, James and Lovelace, Robin},
  year = {2022},
  journal = {Proceedings of the Academic Track at State of the Map 2022},
  doi = {10.5281/zenodo.7004509},
  url = {https://zenodo.org/record/7004509}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
